title: What part of Sephiroth system is this
display_title: What part of Sephiroth system is this
wikitext:
[]: What part of Sephiroth system is this?             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Aug 08, 2009 8:43 pm This has propably been answered somewhere but... [URL=http://img197.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap468752.png/] [/URL] What part of Sephiroth system is Rei in? I'm not sure if she is in I. Ehyeh אהיה I Am or in X. Adonai אדני My Lord Of course there's possibility that she is in some other too (though I is my number one guess, judging from pic) but those were my first guesses... This is actually pretty important for certain musings I'm formulating right now [URL=http://img269.imageshack.us/i/systemofsephiroth.jpg/] [/URL] [URL=http://img269.imageshack.us/i/vlcsnap469221.png/] [/URL] [URL=http://g.imageshack.us/img269/vlcsnap469221.png/1/] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Aug 08, 2009 8:52 pm She is at Yesod (Foundation). To quote wikipedia - 'The sephirah of yesod translates spiritual concepts into actions that unite us with God. It is often associated with the moon, because it is the sphere which reflects the light of all the other sephirot into Malkuth, and it is associated with the sexual organs, because it is here that the higher spheres connect to the earth. It plays the role of collecting and balancing the different and opposing energies of Hod and Netzach, and also from Tiphereth above it, storing and distributing it throughout the world. It is likened to the 'engine-room' of creation. The archangel of this sphere is Gabriel, and the Cherubim is the Angelic order' EDIT Actually now that I look at it more closely that Tree of Life that is shown there isn't done right. Look at it more closely and you'll see what I mean.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:20 pm schismatics wrote: She is at Yesod (Foundation).

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sat Aug 08, 2009 9:32 pm Xard wrote: Yeah, there shouldn't be those two lines leaving from Yesod - that was the thing that confused me the most

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Aug 09, 2009 2:36 am There are 3 pits on the axis beyond her -- that makes her position equivalent to Malkuth; the comment about the extra lines radiating to lower left and right still applies. That the further six pits form a beehive (as in Conway's game of Life) is clearly indicating that the false sephiroth of Da'ath isn't present in the diagram. Wikipedia wrote: Malkuth ("kingdom"; מלכות), or Shekhinah is the tenth of the sephirot in the Kabbalistic Tree of Life. It sits at the bottom of the Tree, below Yesod. This sephirah has as a symbol the Bride which relates to the sphere of Tipheret, symbolized by the Bridegroom. Unlike the other nine sephirot, it is an attribute of God which does not emanate from God directly. Rather it emanates from God's creation -- when that creation reflects and evinces God's glory from within itself.

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Sun Aug 09, 2009 6:49 pm schismatics wrote: Xard wrote: Yeah, there shouldn't be those two lines leaving from Yesod - that was the thing that confused me the most

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Sun Aug 09, 2009 7:06 pm Xard wrote: Especially bolded parts just SCREAM Rei and Lilith. Show has never before failed to make Rei-Moon connection when it is possible. "engine-room of creation" describes Lilith-Mother perfectly and thing about sexual organs ties to sexual imagery of Lilith's "transcendence" sequence

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Aug 09, 2009 8:39 pm more like hes laughing at us for caring so much :P

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 10, 2009 1:48 am Until I checked the wikipedia link, I'd not put together the Malkuth=Shekinah connection -- despite Shekinah having been long bandied about as a label for what role the Giant Naked Alchymic Marriage in EoE actually plays. schismatics wrote: (Anno's sitting in his house enjoying our money )

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Mon Aug 10, 2009 10:47 am From what I remember, the Kether of one Tree would serve as Malkuth for another, so there would be a line of (infinite?) ascending Sephirotic Trees, one a higher level than the other. That would explain the lines heading off from Rei's Malkuth.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:13 pm She could be both. Those are a lot of vats of LCL not being used. What if each one represents an individual copy of the Dummy Plug and Rei has to spend time in each one at some point for memory backup?

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Mon Aug 10, 2009 2:21 pm I could see that but I think it'd be kinda odd to still be working on the Dummy Plug system when they've stopped using it...and they wouldn't be collecting information for Seele because they already got a Dummy Plug based off of Kaworu that they used in the MP Evas. Maybe Gendo and NERV was planning on making some of their own MP Evas? :shrugs:

[]:             Quote Post by Sael » Tue Sep 08, 2009 5:26 pm Hey, yeah! Always reading, now finallsy registered! Especially for this thread. @ topic: There exists another form of the sephiroth, where you have a slightly different arrangement. In that system there is a sephira called Da'ath above Tifereth. Like this Rei would be floating in Jesod (if I see that right, it's late for me ) http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/4/44/Tree_of_Life_%28Sephiroth%29.svg Sadly I don't know what that Da'ath thingy is - only that it exists. greetings
